entities.description: The social distinction between men and women influencing access and use of climate information services

entities.description: Services providing climate data to farmers for strategic farm decision-making

entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agriculture and livelihoods

entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.description: Tools used for the dissemination of downscaled seasonal forecast information

entities.description: A specific mobile phone platform used to disseminate climate information to farmers

entities.description: A data collection method used to gather information from 900 farmers

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: A qualitative data collection method involving four 20-member groups

entities.name: STRONG WINDS
entities.description: A perceived manifestation of climate change observed by farmers

entities.description: A perceived manifestation of climate change observed by farmers

entities.description: A perceived manifestation of climate change observed by farmers

entities.description: A perceived manifestation of climate change observed by farmers

entities.description: A perceived manifestation of climate change observed by farmers

entities.description: The process of reducing risks associated with climate change in agriculture

entities.name: FINANCIAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Economic means that enable the purchase of mobile phones

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME
entities.description: The total income of a household, often controlled by men

entities.name: STRATEGIC FARM DECISION-MAKING
entities.description: The process of planning farm activities such as land preparation and planting

entities.description: A technical constraint affecting the access and use of the Esoko platform
